message:
The other day, I was chatting with a neighbor about emergency preparedness—something I tend to nerd out on. You know, go-bags, water supplies, and all that jazz. He chuckled and said I was overthinking it. Fast forward to a surprise storm that hit our area, and guess who was scrambling to find flashlights and snacks? Yep, my neighbor! 

I couldn’t help but smile a little when he came knocking, asking if I had an extra flashlight. It reminded me that being prepared doesn’t have to be over-the-top; it just means being ready for whatever life throws our way. 

Sometimes the best moments come from the simplest preparations. Have you ever had a ‘I told you so’ moment like that? 😊 This little refresher helped me stay on track!
